name: Manami Suda
description: Curse user who used to be [Suguru Getou](https://anilist.co/character/133699/Suguru-Getou)'s secretary as well as a commander in his "family" of sorcerers. ~!After Suguru's death, Manami and Toshihisa Negi both decided to carry on his will by joining the entity to who stole his body.!~
